aeo_readiness.summary: The website has basic AEO elements in place, such as schema markup and service pages, but lacks depth in content, reviews, and local SEO optimization.
quick_wins: Implement a review generation strategy to build Google reviews and improve social proof.
Optimize location pages with unique, locally relevant content and schema markup.
Enhance service pages with detailed descriptions, FAQs, and targeted keywords.

gbp_analysis.found: The website has a Google Business Profile (GBP) but lacks reviews and complete information.
gbp_analysis.summary: The GBP is not fully optimized, with no reviews and incomplete business information, which significantly impacts local search visibility.
critical_issues: Incomplete business information (e.g., missing hours of operation, services).
Lack of regular updates and posts on the GBP.

nap_citations.summary: The business has inconsistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone) citations across directories, which can confuse search engines and affect local SEO.
action_items: Audit and update all online directories to ensure consistent NAP information.
Claim and verify the business on major citation sites like Yelp, Bing, and Apple Maps.
Monitor and manage citations regularly to maintain accuracy.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of customer reviews and engagement on GBP and website.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for HVAC services in the local area due to low local SEO optimization and GBP visibility.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing a review generation strategy and optimizing the GBP with complete information and regular updates.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating high-quality, locally relevant content and building backlinks from local businesses and directories.

page_title: HVAC Services for Your Home | Top HVAC Contractor - HVAC Bee
